title: AssetOwnership
description: One assignment of an OM user to a role on an asset (Domain or CodeSet). Populated by the OM ownership webhook (SPEC §2.4) and during bootstrap as provisional.

is_provisional.description: True when the assignment was made by RDM during bootstrap (CodeSet creator → OWNER) before OM confirmed.

source_event_id.description: OM ChangeEvent id, when the assignment came from a webhook. Used for idempotency.
